summary: Mobile responsive testing for AccountsBoard.jsx completed successfully. All responsive features verified at 375px mobile viewport. Header sticky, tabs sticky, bottom nav fixed, grids responsive (3-col on mobile vs 9-col/6-col on desktop), date filters stack vertically, tables have horizontal scroll. Desktop (1920px) shows no regression - full tab labels and proper grid layouts maintained.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsive AccountsBoard verified: (1) Fixed header stays at top when scrolling (AppHeader sticky top-0), (2) Sticky tab bar with short labels (Cash/Cheques/Projects) below header, (3) Fixed bottom nav with 4 tabs (Dashboard, Approvals, HR, More), (4) Financial Overview 3-col grid on mobile vs 9-col on desktop, (5) Expense categories 3-col grid on mobile vs 6-col on desktop, (6) Date filters stack vertically on mobile, (7) All tables have horizontal scroll on mobile, (8) Cheques tab 3x2 stat cards grid, (9) Petty Cash Management 2-col summary cards on mobile, (10) SE Mini Cashbook detail 3-col summary cards with scrollable table.

mobile_375px.fixed_header: PASS - Header stays at y=0 after scrolling
mobile_375px.sticky_tabs: PASS - Tab bar visible at y=64 after scrolling (below header)
mobile_375px.fixed_bottom_nav: PASS - 4 tabs visible (Dashboard, Approvals, HR, More)
mobile_375px.financial_overview_3col_grid: PASS - Payment mode cards in 3-column layout
mobile_375px.cheques_tab_3x2_grid: PASS - 6 stat cards (Total, Incoming, Outgoing, Pending, Bounced, Cleared)

desktop_1920px.financial_overview_9col_grid: PASS - All 9 payment mode cards in single row
desktop_1920px.expense_categories_6col: PASS - 6 category cards in single row
desktop_1920px.full_tab_labels: PASS - Cashbook, Cheque Management, Project Summary visible
desktop_1920px.bottom_nav_hidden: PASS - Mobile bottom nav not visible on desktop
